fields.title: Brief task title
fields.context: Current state and what's been done

rules: Don't add single-session tasks (those go in today.md)
Don't add high-level goals (those go in goals.md)
Remind user about tasks stale >14 days

tasks.title: Charades code cleanup pass
tasks.context: The first cleanup slice is done: `useGameState` runtime helpers were extracted and covered by a lightweight check. Remaining cleanup still includes dead presenter/runtime leftovers after recent refactors and oversized files in results/playboard that are hard to maintain.
tasks.next_action: Remove dead presenter/runtime leftovers next, then split the remaining oversized Charades files only where responsibilities are still mixed.

tasks.title: Charades host menu and settings navigation polish
tasks.context: The shared host navigation framework now exists in `@party/ui` + `@party/game-sdk`, and Charades has been migrated as the reference consumer across menu, settings, setup, and core runtime overlays. Runtime controls were further simplified so gameplay accept actions now use `confirm`, `Akcja glowna` was removed from settings bindings, and persisted legacy bindings are migrated into the new confirm slots.
tasks.next_action: Run a focused manual polish pass on Charades runtime pause/verdict flow and remaining keyboard/controller rough edges, then close the Charades host-navigation polish task.
